reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at this station. ACA stations always offer superior quality compared to their competitors.

reviews.comment:
Un lugar para recomendar al 100%. Excelentes instalaciones, ya sea para tomar o comer algo, baños impecables.  Dejo mi auto  desde hace un año en su cochera y no tiene ni un solo detalle. La actitud de los empleados es la optima, educados y siempre dispuestos a una rapida atención.
Los Felicitos sigan así 💪

(Translated by Google)
A place I wholeheartedly recommend. Excellent facilities, whether for a drink or a meal, and spotless restrooms. I've been leaving my car in their garage for a year now, and it's never been without a single problem. The staff is incredibly friendly, polite, and always ready to provide prompt service. Congratulations, keep up the great work! 💪
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2MTRxdHlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio ACA en el corazón de la ciudad de Neuquén. Critica constructiva, falta mucha limpieza y cuidados en los baños son realmente muy feos.

(Translated by Google)
ACA gas station in the heart of Neuquén city. Constructive criticism: the bathrooms are in very poor condition and lack cleanliness.
